name: Vaisakhi
traditions: Visiting gurdwaras; Nagar Kirtan processions; performing bhangra dance; langar communal meals; reading of scriptures; fairs and markets.
historicalBackground: Vaisakhi commemorates the founding of the Khalsa by Guru Gobind Singh in 1699. It also marks the Punjabi New Year and spring harvest festival.
description: The Sikh New Year and harvest festival commemorating the founding of the Khalsa, celebrated with processions, music, and communal feasts.
